bead.title: execute-bead: ignore worker sidecars during pre-dispatch checkpoint
bead.description:
PROBLEM
A project that predates the current ddx init gitignore rules can have untracked `.ddx/workers/<id>/status.json` liveness sidecars after `ddx work` attempts. On the next `ddx work`, the pre-dispatch checkpoint treats those worker sidecars as ordinary implementation dirt and aborts with `checkpoint refused to absorb implementation changes outside DDx bookkeeping`. Observed on `/Users/erik/Projects/fizeau` on 2026-05-14: three stale `.ddx/workers/agent-loop-*/status.json` files were listed beside real docs/config changes and blocked `fizeau-8134d6db` before the worker could start.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go:704-766` asks `git status --porcelain=v1 -z --untracked-files=all --ignored=matching -- .` and returns every non-ignored untracked path unless it is filtered later.
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go:792-809` filters lock files, attachments, and temporary bead files in `preDispatchCheckpointIgnoredPath`, but it does not filter `.ddx/workers/`.
- `cli/cmd/init.go:18-22` now writes `.ddx/workers/` to new-project gitignore rules, but older repos can lack that rule. DDx should not require every existing project to be manually repaired before execute-bead can run.

PROPOSED FIX
- Treat `.ddx/workers/` as DDx runtime scratch in the pre-dispatch checkpoint regardless of the project gitignore contents. The most direct fix is to add `.ddx/workers/` to `preDispatchCheckpointIgnoredPath` rather than allowing it into `allowedPaths` and checkpoint commits.
- Add a regression test that creates a git repo with no `.ddx/workers/` gitignore rule, writes `.ddx/workers/agent-loop-test/status.json`, and asserts `preDispatchCheckpointDirtyPaths` returns no worker path and `checkpointPreDispatchDirt` does not refuse.
- Keep existing behavior for real implementation files unchanged: an ordinary untracked file must still block with the current checkpoint refusal message.

NON-SCOPE
- Do not change the worker liveness sidecar format.
- Do not remove `.ddx/workers/` from `ddx init` gitignore rules; this is an additional hardening path for old repos.
- Do not auto-delete worker sidecars; cleanup/pruning remains owned by existing execution cleanup paths.

Parent: ddx-a3589116. Dependencies: none.
bead.acceptance:
1. Add `TestPreDispatchCheckpoint_IgnoresWorkerSidecarsWithoutGitignore` in `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_checkpoint_test.go`: create a git repo whose `.gitignore` does not mention `.ddx/workers/`, write `.ddx/workers/agent-loop-test/status.json`, and assert `preDispatchCheckpointDirtyPaths` omits `.ddx/workers/agent-loop-test/status.json`.
2. The same test or a sibling test calls `checkpointPreDispatchDirt` and asserts it returns `(false, nil)` when the only dirt is `.ddx/workers/<id>/status.json`.
3. Add/keep a negative assertion that an ordinary untracked file such as `feature.txt` still appears in `preDispatchCheckpointDirtyPaths` and still triggers the existing `checkpoint refused to absorb implementation changes outside DDx bookkeeping` error.
4. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run "TestPreDispatchCheckpoint_IgnoresWorkerSidecarsWithoutGitignore|TestCheckpointPreDispatch" -count=1` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
